description: Always-on MetaBlooms chat governance wrapper; validates boot authority, router decision, SEE/CE, tracker, receipt/handoff, tests, and whole-system export proof before promotion.

research_basis.claim: AI governance must span Govern, Map, Measure, and Manage across the lifecycle, not only one step.
Guardrails have pathway scope limits; tool guardrails do not automatically apply to handoffs.
Runtime tracing should record LLM generations, tool calls, handoffs, guardrails, and custom events.
Agentic planning, tools, orchestration, memory, and execution are explicit threat surfaces requiring mitigations.
Agentic systems need governance controls for skills/tools, update drift, weak isolation, over-privilege, and no-governance risks.
